dj-music.description: DJ techno music specialist — manages library, builds sets, analyzes audio transitions, works with Yandex Music/Beatport/Suno. Triggers on: dj, set, mix, track, transition.

ym-api-specialist.description: Yandex Music API specialist — debug provider_read/write/search, investigate 429/403/400 errors, trace YM API quirks.

command: set -a && source /Users/laptop/dev/dj-music-plugin/.env && set +a && export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="${DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN}" && exec npx -y @supabase/mcp-server-supabase@0.7.0 --read-only --project-ref="${DJ_DB_PROJECT_REF:-bowosphlnghhgaulcyfm}" --features=database,docs,debug
